Wait, I just realized that I forgot to ask you something. Do you know how to bake sourdough bread? I've heard that it's very difficult, but it's also very delicious. The key to a good sourdough bread is to use a high quality starter. A starter is a mixture of flour and water that allows wild yeast and bacteria to grow. You can make your own starter by mixing equal parts flour and water and letting it sit at room temperature for several days. You need to feed the starter every day as it grows. Once the starter is active and bubbly, you can use it to bake bread. You'll also need flour, water, and salt.
